education.label: EDUCATION
education.title: Education
education.isii_degree: Diploma with Qualification of Technical Leader in Computer Science

experience.label: EXPERIENCE
experience.title: Experience
experience.ePol-description: Development of web applications for business process management.
experience.latitudo-description: Development/refactoring of WEB applications using Vue.JS and .NET 6 stack. Development and maintenance of Python scripts. In 2021, during University internship, created a custom view for Microsoft Power BI using APIs and React.
experience.baleraortica-description: Creation of a booking platform for the company's dance classes.
experience.brainfarm-description: Technical assistance and hardware/software maintenance at the Province of Piacenza.
experience.studiolarosadance-description: Website creation for a sports business using WordPress Avada theme. A dance class booking platform was later added to the project.
experience.hes-description: Creation of customized CRM platforms for various clients' workflows using C# (ASP.NET with EXT.NET), mobile (XAMARIN) and SQL.
experience.amada-description: Technical assistance and hardware/software maintenance at the Piacenza headquarters.

skill.label: SKILLS
skill.title: Skills
skill.angular-description: Self-taught. Used Angular in the development of medium-high complexity applications, leveraging components, two-way data binding and integrated Router for smooth navigation.
skill.vue-description: Used Vue.js in developing medium-high complexity SPAs, organizing code into reusable components with reactive data binding system.
skill.flutter-description: Cross-platform framework (Android, iOS, Web). Used for creating small and medium complexity applications with powerful and reactive UI toolkit.
skill.csharp-description: Learned at school. Experience with .NET framework for web apps (ASP.NET, Blazor), desktop (WPF, UWP), mobile (Xamarin) and gaming (Unity).
skill.laravel-description: Used in both frontend and backend with Web API development. Appreciated for database operations simplicity and secure authentication structure.
skill.python-description: Learned in academic context with advanced features. Experience with Flask, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy and neural network training for Computer Vision.
skill.sql-description: Used in MySQL, Microsoft SQL Server, and SQLite variants. Skills in table structures, complex queries, views and stored procedures.

certification.label: CERTIFICATIONS
certification.title: Certifications
certification.az104-description: Skills to manage Microsoft Azure cloud services, including compute, networking, storage and security. Virtual network configuration, resource monitoring, backup and identity management.
certification.az900-description: Fundamental knowledge of Microsoft Azure cloud services. Cloud computing concepts, deployment models, security, privacy and pricing.
certification.sc900-title: SC-900: Microsoft Security, Compliance, and Identity Fundamentals
certification.sc900-description: Fundamental knowledge of security, compliance and identity in Microsoft 365 and Azure. Security, privacy and compliance principles in the cloud.
certification.ai900-description: Fundamental knowledge of AI and Machine Learning in Microsoft Azure. AI/ML services, security and pricing.

project.label: PROJECTS
project.title: Projects
project.project-collecchio-description: iOS/Android mobile app for reporting dangers affecting people with disabilities. Built with Flutter and TensorFlow Lite computer vision, in collaboration with the University of Parma.
project.project-piacenza-ar-description: App designed for tourists with 3D models of city monuments using Google Earth, Unity and Vuforia with interactive historical notes.
project.project-armatamente-20-description: School project for the San Paolo Foundation of Turin 2017 tender, aimed at recovering the lost ARMATAMENTE project website.
project.project-museo-3d-description: Fully traversable 3D environment with interactive historical content. Awarded for extraordinary originality, recognized by the international EUSTORY network.
